summary: High‑quality audience recording captures an electrifying show with standout performances of Cassidy, Terrapin Station, Sugar Magnolia and more.
review: The tape delivers crystal‑clear audience sound that rivals many soundboard releases, letting the band’s high‑energy playing shine through. Highlights include a ripping Jerry Garcia solo, soaring Terrapin Station jams and a freight‑train close with Sugar Magnolia. Fans repeatedly note the inspired vibe and excellent remastering.

ai_rating.rationale: All seven reviews are overwhelmingly positive, praising both the musical performance and the superb audience recording/remaster; the consensus points to an exceptional show with excellent audio.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners describe the tape as a high‑quality audience recording with a clean remaster, crisp clarity and very little ambient noise despite not being a soundboard source.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two‑set show packed with high energy; the band rolls like a freight train into a spectacular closing Sugar Magnolia, with strong jams and seamless transitions throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers note Jerry was "on fire" all night, delivering guitar that 'talked' and made the show unforgettable.
